name: blank-invoice-maker
description: Create free, no-signup invoices from your AI assistant.
long_description: An MCP server for Blank Invoice Maker, the free no-signup invoice generator. Describe an invoice in plain language and `create_invoice` returns a link that opens blankinvoicemaker.com fully pre-filled, ready to download as a watermark-free PDF. `list_templates` lists the available industry templates. Invoice data stays in your browser — the details travel in the link's URL fragment and are never sent to a server.

tools.name: list_templates
tools.description: List the available invoice templates on Blank Invoice Maker

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Build an invoice and return a pre-filled blankinvoicemaker.com link
